body:
## Sprint dispatched - CEO direct (P1-P3) complete, P4-P9 spawned as child issues

### P1: QUA-671 to blocked (DL-046 enforcement) - DONE

- Comment posted on QUA-671 (id 55ac082e-3cc5-46c6-81c7-db1dea2b1389) with durable record.
- PATCH succeeded: QUA-671 status=`blocked`, blockedReason set. (`updatedAt: 2026-05-09T06:59:01Z`).
- WAIT_GUARD cleanup dispatched as child QUA-1028 (DevOps).

### P2: 4 idle agents heartbeat-disabled - DONE

All PATCH'd to `runtimeConfig.heartbeat.enabled=false, wakeOnDemand=true`:

| Agent | UUID | Prior interval | New |
|---|---|---|---|
| Token-Controller-2 | acf5d16b | 3600s | enabled=false |
| Gmail-Monitor | 6dcf0a42 | 1800s | enabled=false |
| Controlling-Agent | a790f129 | 7200s | enabled=false |
| Token-Controller | bd089fcb | 3600s | enabled=false |

All 4 remain `idle` and assignment-wakeable; only timer-wakes are stopped. No /pause API used.

### P3: CEO + CoS to assignment-only - DONE

- Chief-of-Staff (38f933cd): `runtimeConfig.heartbeat.enabled=false, wakeOnDemand=true`.
- CEO self-PATCH (7795b4b0): same. Daily 06:00 routine + assignment-wakes + comment-wakes preserved.

### P4-P9 dispatched as child issues:

| Punkt | Child | Assignee | Type |
|---|---|---|---|
| P4 | QUA-1026 | CTO (241ccf3c) | P3 dispatch-key fix (run_smoke.ps1 + p3_param_sweep.py + p5/p6 drivers) |
| P5 | QUA-1027 | DevOps (86015301) | EA-source-dirs hygiene (move QUA-* out, .gitignore) |
| QUA-671 cleanup | QUA-1028 | DevOps (86015301) | Stop wait_guard polling, archive old WAIT_GUARDs |
| P6 | QUA-1029 | CTO | ceo_queue_sweep.py (~60% CEO token reduction) |
| P7 | QUA-1030 | CTO | Migrate >=3 deterministic skills to process-adapter |
| P8 | QUA-1031 | CTO | continuation-cap fix in heartbeat.ts:3155+ (local patch, no upstream) |
| P9 | QUA-1032 | OWNER (local-board) | Budget hard-stops + Codex cost-event ingest (OWNER-class) |

### Acceptance signals to watch (24h)

- `/api/heartbeat-runs?agentId={4-disabled}` shows 0 automation-triggered runs.
- `/api/heartbeat-runs?agentId=7795b4b0&type=automation` empties; only `routine`/`assignment`/`comment` survive.
- No new `docs/ops/QUA-671_WAIT_GUARD_*.json` after the cutoff.

### Notes

- All actions per OWNER mandate in this issue's wake comment - within CEO config-PATCH scope (memory `feedback_paperclip_agent_config_patch_works`). No /pause API used.
- QUA-671 `blockedReason` field actually persisted on the response (memory `feedback_blocked_reason_schema_gap` may be partly resolved by QUA-682). Comment thread remains the durable record.
- API quirk discovered: POST `/api/companies/{id}/issues` accepts `parentId` and `projectId` but silently drops `assigneeId`/`assigneeAgentId`/`assigneeUserId`/`title` em-dashes. Always PATCH after create with `assigneeAgentId` (not `assigneeId`) and ASCII title.

Flipping to in_review for OWNER acceptance. CTO and DevOps will pick up their assigned children on next routine wake or assignment trigger.
